title: Into the Woods
description: A Slay the Spire-inspired 2D turn-based roguelike built in Unity. Procedurally generated 5-column node maps, a dice-based action economy, and a boon/loyalty system with rewards at key combat thresholds.

title: Project Two
description: Short description of what this project does and what role you played in building it.
